span.t-esc: company.country_id.code and company.zip and (company.country_id.code + '-' + company.zip) or company.country_id.code or company.zip
o.partner_id.country_id.code and o.partner_id.zip and (o.partner_id.country_id.code + '-' + o.partner_id.zip) or o.partner_id.country_id.code or o.partner_id.zip
company.country_id.code and company.zip and (company.country_id.code + '-' + company.zip) or company.country_id.code or company.zip
o.partner_id.country_id.code and o.partner_id.zip and (o.partner_id.country_id.code + '-' + o.partner_id.zip) or o.partner_id.country_id.code or o.partner_id.zip
